name: hyperwave-wallet-cashu
description: HyperWave Cashu wallet: a Chaumian-ecash (Cashu, on a Lightning mint) implementation of the hyperwave-engine Wallet interface, runs under Bare.
author: Mokhtar Naamani <mokhtar.naamani@gmail.com>

scripts.lint:jsdoc: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --strict --skipLibCheck --maxNodeModuleJsDepth 0 --target es2022 lib/cashu-wallet.js lib/cashu-burn.js lib/nums.js lib/proof-store.js lib/bare-web-shims.js 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS80' ; test $? -eq 1
